meta.content: Bishal Mistri is a Product Designer contributing to a better future by solving one problem at a time.
meta.name: description

div.p: Bishal Mistri
div.h1: I'm micro observer, identifying micro pain points, design smarter, more efficient solutions.

div.p: Product Designer with 5+ years of experience delivering end-to-end, user-centered digital experiences for B2B SaaS platforms serving US and global clients. Drove 18% annual sales increase and 26% boost in subscription renewals through data- informed design decisions on the Friender platform. Skilled in product discovery, systems thinking, and translating complex workflows into scalable, accessible solutions. Adept at stakeholder alignment, cross-functional collaboration (PM, Eng, QA), and shipping production-ready designs in agile environments.

I was born and raised in Ashoknagar, an urban town near Kolkata. From a very young age, I was deeply drawn to anything creative. Long before I knew what digital design was, I was constantly working with my hands making handmade crafts, painting, and drawing. For me, creativity wasn't just a hobby; it was my primary way of expressing myself and understanding the world around me. Those early days spent sketching and crafting from scratch laid the artistic foundation for the way I look at design today.

My academic journey was a process of continuous exploration. A pivotal shift happened back in 2015, while I was in the 10th standard, when I got my first PC. As I spent more time online, I constantly ran into frustrating user issues and clunky websites. Because I've always been someone who wants to fix things, I started looking into how I could solve these digital roadblocks myself. That curiosity led me directly to the world of UI/UX. Later, as I attended West Bengal State University (WBSU) and graduated with a degree in Arts, I realized I could perfectly combine my traditional artistic background with this new problem-solving mindset to fix the very issues I faced as a user. From there, I dove headfirst into learning the craft.

Today, I bring that same childhood creativity and "fixer" mentality into my career as a UI/UX Designer. With over five years of professional experience working remotely, I specialize in transforming complex problems into seamless, user-centric digital products. My day-to-day focus ranges from architecting large-scale, scalable design systems in Figma for robust SaaS platforms to exploring innovative ways AI can streamline workflows for digital managers.

Beyond the screen, I carry an entrepreneurial spirit and a love for adventure, often heading out on my Royal Enfield for solo trips to find fresh inspiration. Whether I am crafting a digital interface or exploring a new road, my goal is always to build meaningful, impactful experiences that connect with people.
SmartRide — Smart Bike Mobile App

SmartRide is a mobile application designed to provide seamless control, monitoring, and security features for smart bikes. The app allows users to remotely lock/unlock their bikes, track real-time location, monitor battery and performance metrics, and configure ride preferences. With an intuitive UI/UX, the app enhances user convenience and promotes safer, smarter, and more efficient biking experiences.
Furniture Selling Website Landing Page Design

img.alt: Furniture Selling Website Landing Page Design

div.p: Bike & Car Rental Website

Website for a bike and car rental company. The website should have a user-friendly interface that allows customers to easily browse and reserve vehicles online. The website should include features such as a search bar, filters for specific vehicle types and rental locations, and a booking system that allows users to select dates and times for their rental.

img.alt: Bike and Car Rental Website Design

div.h1: How my AI solution saving users 3 hours a day

div.p: Implement a with AI something that help our users create and run campaign post efficiently through our platform. I have choose this problem statement as this challenge where I could show my Product design thinking efficiently
Friender’s post scheduling and publishing posts automatically across personal profiles and Facebook Groups.
Freinder features built in AI intelligence capable of generating a full month’s worth of high quality text and Image in minutes.
Beyond just posting, it can actively interact with your audience by commenting on posts on your behalf.
It provides a comprehensive monthly calendar view to track the progression of various marketing campaigns.

div.span: Reduce time to create 30 days of content, Reduce effort in thinking of ideas.
Ensure content consistency, Maintain brand tone automatically.
Posting content on time Facebook without manual intervention or any delay.
AI Quickly generate Intent based content and matching visuals.

div.div:
Without further delay,
let's drive straight into the solution
After click on schedule user can directly open the Creation page.

My 2026 product design resume
I prefer to read email over other forms of communication. I usually don't respond to DMs on other platforms. Feel free to reach out.
